content_body:
Most Popular Waterfall Hike in Blue Ridge

Due to its close proximity to Blue Ridge (just 15 minutes from Downtown Blue Ridge) and cabin rentals located along Aska Road, Fall Branch Falls is popular with families. Plus, it's an outdoor activity fun for the family that doesn't take all day leaving time for other fun things to do in Blue Ridge.

Fall Branch Falls is a stunning double waterfall nestled in the lush Chattahoochee National Forest.

This picturesque destination features a short scenic hike through a serene wooded trail, offering visitors the opportunity to experience the natural beauty of the North Georgia mountains. The falls cascade over a series of rock ledges, creating a tranquil and mesmerizing sight.

Easy Waterfall Hiking Trail

Perfect for hikers of all skill levels, Fall Branch Falls provides a peaceful escape into nature and is an ideal spot for photography, picnicking, and enjoying the great outdoors. 

Enjoy a viewing deck of the falls in all their glory, a natural pool at the falls' bottom, and an additional trail to hike to the top of the falls. 

Best Photo Op in Blue Ridge

If you're looking for an awesome place for a family photo, Fall Branch Falls is the perfect spot!
title: Fall Branch Falls
